1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct skredrisikokvikkleireklasse values in utlopomr

3.description: select quick-clay polygons (utlopomr) filtered by the chosen high-risk class

4.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to those intersecting Trondheim municipality

5.description: get parcels (teig) in Trondheim with area > 5000 m2

6.description: find parcels that intersect reduced quick-clay polygons

7.description: collapse to one row per parcel with area (areal_m2) and municipality

10.description: get county (fylke) that contains Trondheim municipality geometry

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, objid, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr
WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT utlopomr.objid, utlopomr.omrade, utlopomr.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr
WHERE utlopomr.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '5';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"
